titleStmt.title: SII 18.40: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 40. (B.K. No. 170 of 1933-34.) KĀKHAṆḌKI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Kaṇvīrappa temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 915, Jaya, Āshāḍha Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Solar eclipse. The Śaka year quoted is the expired year. The details correspond to A.D. 994, October 7, Sunday. But there was no solar eclipse on that day; it occurred, however, in that year on Pushya Amāvāsyā corresponding to A.D. 995, January 4, Friday.

It records the grant of certain taxes to the Two-hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra town Kākaṇḍike (modern Kākhaṇḍki). It is interesting to note that Mānyakhēḍa (modern Maḷkhēḍ) was the capital of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
śrīmadāhavamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire mānyakhēḍada nelevīḍinoḷ sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire sakavarṣaṁ 915 neya jayasaṁ
vatsarada Āṣāḍhadamavāsye Ādityavāra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu svasti
yamaniyamamasvādhyādhāraṇamānānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhisaṁ
pannarappa śrīmaduttamadagrahāraṁ kākaṇḍi keyūroḍeya pramukha ma
hājanaminnūrvvargge pūrvvasvarūpadiṁ sarvvanamasyamappa
śiḷāśāsanavyavasteyenteṁdaḍe . niyatamārggamaryyādeyeṁdu
ṇteṟuvādaṁtā Adaralliya daśavandhama ndasavarmmadēva maryyāde
kōlu vīsaveṁṭṭu voṁdu mattarmmogeya keyya vīpa
vā voṭṭage kariya nela kisaramaṁ kākaṇḍigeyoḷ . ki nasinoḷaṁ ṁḍige pattu vīsa
pūkkaḷiyadu paṁcarasavarjamārcanābhōga sarbbanamaśya
meṟaḍu kiṟugoḷa yī daṇḍamūkadeydiḍe daṇḍa . Avivennade pā
rvvara mane mānya visaka dēvabhōgaruvaṇamoṁdiṁtivumeyde kā
pu peṟavaṇavellamaṁ takkudaṟiṁdaṁ naḍeyisugellaṁ . Inite pavaṇeṁ
ya kāpina desegarasiṁge mūṟu ponne nibandhaṁ manedeṟeyo
śimaneyire paḷemanege salike posamanegarddha sthiravā
vibhudhāgragaṇyarabhayade mānyamaṁ mahādānigaḷ niravadyar ba
hutarkkaśāstrakuśaḷarvvēdāṁtaśikṣāparisphuritabrahmavinōdar
kamaṁ kēḷdeyde kākaṇḍikāpuradinnūrvvaru guṇapraṇayadiṁ dhā
trītaḷaṁ baṇnikuṁ sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālēkālē pālanī
yō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān bhāginaṟpārtthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā bhūribhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalē . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
